title: Community Package
description: Manifest for community contributions to claude-super-setup — lives at the root of a contribution PR as package.yaml or package.json

name.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this package — must be lowercase, start with a letter, and contain only letters, digits, and hyphens

type.description: Primary type of artifact this package contributes

description.description: Short human-readable description of what this package provides — minimum 10 characters
examples: An agent that reviews SQL queries for correctness and performance.

homepage.description: URL to the package homepage, docs, or source repository

artifacts.description: List of artifact files this package contributes — at least one required

path.description: Relative path to the artifact file from the package root

install_to.description: Optional override for the install destination path (relative to ~/.claude/)

claude_super_setup.description: Minimum version of claude-super-setup required (semver range)

mcp_servers.description: MCP server identifiers this package depends on — users will be prompted to install missing ones

tags.description: Keyword tags used for search and discovery in the marketplace

model_tier.description: Recommended Claude model tier for running this package's artifacts

test_command.description: Shell command to run in CI to verify the package is working correctly

changelog.description: URL or relative path to the CHANGELOG file for this package
